Answer each of the following questions based ONLY on what you know from our conversation.
Be specific: include exact numbers, names, paths, versions.
If you don't remember or aren't sure, say "I don't recall".

- [LM_0131] Where did I go on my most recent family trip?
- [LM_0151] How many videos of Corey Schafer's Python programming series have I completed so far?
- [LM_0174] How much time do I dedicate to coding exercises each day?
- [LM_0203] Can you suggest a hotel for my upcoming trip to Miami?
- [LM_0228] Can you suggest some activities I can do during my commute to work?

- [LM_0234] Can you remind me of the name of the romantic Italian restaurant in Rome you recommended for dinner?
- [LM_0241] I was thinking about our previous conversation about the Fifth Album, and I was wondering if you could remind me what song you said best exemplified the band's growth and development as artists?
- [LM_0292] Where do I take yoga classes?
- [LM_0296] What was my previous occupation?

Reply with a JSON array of objects, one per question:
[{"id": "LM_0001", "answer": "your answer"}, ...]

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY the JSON array, no other text.
